is a Namibian [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club from [Swakopmund](/wiki/Swakopmund "Swakopmund"). Founded in 1958, the team currently plays in the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

Football club

Blue Boys

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Full name | Blue Boys Football Club |
| Founded | 1958 |
| Ground | [Mondesa Stadium](/w/index.php?title=Mondesa_Stadium&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mondesa Stadium (page does not exist)"), [Swakopmund](/wiki/Swakopmund "Swakopmund") |
| Capacity | 2,000 |
| League | [Namibia First Division](/wiki/Namibia_First_Division "Namibia First Division") |
| [2024-25 Namibia Premiership](/wiki/2024-25_Namibia_Premiership "2024-25 Namibia Premiership") | [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership") 15th (relegated) |

**Blue Boys FC** is a Namibian [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club from [Swakopmund](/wiki/Swakopmund "Swakopmund"). Founded in 1958, the team currently plays in the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership").

## Stadium

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Blue_Boys_FC&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Stadium")]

Currently, the team plays at the 2000-seat [Mondesa Stadium](/w/index.php?title=Mondesa_Stadium&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mondesa Stadium (page does not exist)").
